div1.entryFree:
Canary, subst. 1) wine from the Canary islands, sweet sack: drink c. with him, Wiv. III, 2, 89 (quibble in 90). a cup of c. Tw. I, 3, 85. Tw. I, 3, 85 you have drunk too much--ies, H4B II, 4, 29 (Mrs. Quickly's speech).
2) a quick and lively dance: breathe life into a stone, quicken a rock, and make you dance c. with spritely fire and motion, All's II, 1, 77. cf. the quibble in Wiv. III, 2, 89 -- Wiv. III, 2, 89
What Mrs. Quickly means by the word in Wiv. II, 2, 61 and 64, it is not easy to say; most Intpp. suspect quandary, but this word is unknown to Sh.
